package rulefixtures

// scenario for rand_newsource_per_call: `rand.NewSource(...)` inside regular call paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule625NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario625Negative(records []Rule625NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
